# The Sovereign Workplace

This directory (`/Workplace`) acts as the centralized nervous system junction for operational outputs. 

## Structure
- `/logs`: All `Execution Trace` records, cryptographically signed Agent consensus votes, and system anomaly reports dump here automatically.
- `/docs`: Generative output, analytical readouts from Assessor or Architecture Agents, and specific domain analysis files generated during the runtime will be routed here.

**Do not edit these files manually.** All `logs` and generative `docs` in this folder are maintained by the Sovereign Architecture. All autonomous agents know to drop reporting traces here to create a single source of truth for the developer.
